headline: Annual Louisiana Fishing Rodeo Reels In More Than $190,000 for the Power To Care
summary: The annual Watt-A-Catch fishing rodeo is dedicated to raising funds for The Power to Care, a crucial program that offers emergency bill assistance to our most vulnerable customers NORTHAMPTON, MA / ACCESS Newswire / July 20, 2026 / By Jordyn Martin ...

headline: Entergy: Visible EPS Growth Backed By Contracted Load Growth
summary: Entergy Corp. is rated a buy, as the contracted data center/industrial load fuels a $67B capital plan and ~13% EPS CAGR to 2030. Click for more on ETR stock.
